summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HoneyGroove UI/UX fixes including composer modal desktop layout, poll creator view, feed filter dropdown, and mobile responsive now spinning modal. All features verified working correctly on desktop (1920px) and mobile (390px) viewports.

minor.issue: Feed filter parameter post_type does not strictly filter - returns all post types. Frontend filtering handles this correctly.

issues: Console shows 503 errors for some external image resources (discogs/musicbrainz album art) - not blocking functionality

seed_data_creation: Created test poll 'Test poll for creator view #4276' for poll creator view testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 UI/UX features verified: (1) Composer bar shows 6 chips in 3x2 grid on desktop, 2x3 on mobile - no truncated labels. (2) Feed filter dropdown with 'All' trigger and chevron works on both viewports. (3) Poll Creator View with 'See results'/'Back to vote' buttons working for creator who hasn't voted. (4) Now Spinning modal has proper mobile-responsive layout with sticky footer. Hardcoded CORS URL removed from server.py. Poll results API working correctly.

poll_creator_view.see_results_button: Visible for creator who hasn't voted
poll_creator_view.results_hidden_after_voting: User who voted sees results directly without See Results button
